memberdef.name: vlc_module_begin
memberdef.initializer: EXTERN_SYMBOL DLL_SYMBOL \ int CDECL_SYMBOL __VLC_SYMBOL(vlc_entry) (vlc_set_cb, void *); \ EXTERN_SYMBOL DLL_SYMBOL \ int CDECL_SYMBOL __VLC_SYMBOL(vlc_entry) (vlc_set_cb vlc_set, void *opaque) \ { \ module_t *module; \ module_config_t *config = NULL; \ if (vlc_plugin_set (VLC_MODULE_CREATE, &module)) \ goto error; \ if (vlc_module_set (VLC_MODULE_NAME, (MODULE_STRING))) \ goto error;

memberdef.name: vlc_module_end
memberdef.initializer: (void) config; \ return 0; \ error: \ return -1; \ } \ VLC_MODULE_NAME_HIDDEN_SYMBOL \ VLC_METADATA_EXPORTS

memberdef.name: add_shortcut
memberdef.initializer: { \ const char *shortcuts[] = { __VA_ARGS__ }; \ if (vlc_module_set (VLC_MODULE_SHORTCUT, \ sizeof(shortcuts)/sizeof(shortcuts[0]), shortcuts)) \ goto error; \ }

memberdef.name: add_typeadv_inner
memberdef.initializer: add_typedesc_inner( type, text, longtext ) \ if (advc) vlc_config_set (VLC_CONFIG_ADVANCED);

memberdef.name: add_typename_inner
memberdef.initializer: add_typeadv_inner( type, text, longtext, advc ) \ vlc_config_set (VLC_CONFIG_NAME, (const char *)(name));

memberdef.name: add_string_inner
memberdef.initializer: add_typename_inner( type, name, text, longtext, advc ) \ vlc_config_set (VLC_CONFIG_VALUE, (const char *)(v));

memberdef.name: add_int_inner
memberdef.initializer: add_typename_inner( type, name, text, longtext, advc ) \ vlc_config_set (VLC_CONFIG_VALUE, (int64_t)(v));

memberdef.name: add_string
memberdef.initializer: add_string_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_STRING, name, text, longtext, advc, \ value )

memberdef.name: add_password
memberdef.initializer: add_string_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_PASSWORD, name, text, longtext, advc, \ value )

memberdef.name: add_loadfile
memberdef.initializer: add_string_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_LOADFILE, name, text, longtext, advc, \ value )

memberdef.name: add_savefile
memberdef.initializer: add_string_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_SAVEFILE, name, text, longtext, advc, \ value )

memberdef.name: add_directory
memberdef.initializer: add_string_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_DIRECTORY, name, text, longtext, advc, \ value )

memberdef.name: add_font
memberdef.initializer: add_string_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_FONT, name, text, longtext, advc, \ value )

memberdef.name: add_module
add_module_list
add_module_cat
add_module_list_cat
add_integer
memberdef.initializer: add_int_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_INTEGER, name, text, longtext, advc, value )

memberdef.name: add_rgb
memberdef.initializer: add_int_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_RGB, name, text, longtext, advc, value ) \ change_integer_range( 0, 0xFFFFFF )

memberdef.name: add_key
memberdef.initializer: add_string_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_KEY, "global-" name, text, longtext, advc, \ KEY_UNSET ) \ add_string_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_KEY, name, text, longtext, advc, value )

memberdef.name: add_integer_with_range
memberdef.initializer: add_integer( name, value, text, longtext, advc ) \ change_integer_range( i_min, i_max )

memberdef.name: add_float
memberdef.initializer: add_typename_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_FLOAT, name, text, longtext, advc ) \ vlc_config_set (VLC_CONFIG_VALUE, (double)(v));

memberdef.name: add_float_with_range
memberdef.initializer: add_float( name, value, text, longtext, advc ) \ change_float_range( f_min, f_max )

memberdef.name: add_bool
memberdef.initializer: add_typename_inner( CONFIG_ITEM_BOOL, name, text, longtext, advc ) \ if (v) vlc_config_set (VLC_CONFIG_VALUE, (int64_t)true);

memberdef.name: VLC_META_EXPORT
memberdef.initializer: EXTERN_SYMBOL DLL_SYMBOL const char * CDECL_SYMBOL \ __VLC_SYMBOL(vlc_entry_ ## name) (void); \ EXTERN_SYMBOL DLL_SYMBOL const char * CDECL_SYMBOL \ __VLC_SYMBOL(vlc_entry_ ## name) (void) \ { \ return value; \ }

memberdef.definition: EXTERN_SYMBOL typedef int(* vlc_set_cb) (void *, void *, int,...)
memberdef.name: vlc_set_cb

detaileddescription.para: This file implements plugin (module) macros used to define a vlc module.
